creator: hiroo.ono+freebsd@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Olivier Duchateau from comment #4)
Because currently, the port depends on spidermonkey 102.
It is in a conflicted state that
* The port's Makefile depends on spidermonkey 102 (which is currently committed)
* The software's meson.build depends on spidermonkey 115

I tried to resolve the conflict by patching the meson.build to match the version in current ports tree.
We can upgrade the port's dependency once the spidermonkey port version 115 is committed.
